mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of final goods and housing starts indicates synchronized demand recovery across durable and residential sectors, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a t-statistic below 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production reflects supply-side bottlenecks and falling factory output, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in >55% of observations during supply-constrained periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: High inflation months are followed by positive 5-day SPX returns in >65% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer spending forecasts and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields a Rank IC below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects sustained macroeconomic expansion that supports corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth quarters are followed by negative 60-day SPX returns in >50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month acceleration in industrial production signals resolving supply bottlenecks and improving manufacturing margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO accelerations are followed by negative 5-day SPX returns in >50% of triggered instances.
